case_title: AVALON BAY COMMUNITIES, INC VS. BOUTHEINA ELOUAER et al

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT VANESSA SAFA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. VANESSA SAFA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 (206)
